pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version from 1.8 to 21 to enable compilation and execution on JDK 21.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.6 to 2.7.18 to align with JDK 21 compatibility requirements and security patches.
Introduce Spring Cloud dependency management to handle transitive dependencies for cloud-native features.
Add Spring Boot Web starter to enable HTTP server capabilities, replacing the basic starter.
Add Apache HttpClient dependency for HTTP client operations.
Add Spring Boot AOP starter to support aspect-oriented programming features like resilience.
Add Spring Cloud CircuitBreaker with Resilience4j for fault tolerance.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry to expose metrics in Prometheus format.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI UI for interactive API documentation.
Add Logback JSON classic dependency for structured JSON logging.
Add Logback Jackson dependency to support JSON serialization in logs.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add Spring Kafka dependency for message queue integration.
Add Spring Boot Data MongoDB starter for database integration.
Add explicit MongoDB sync driver dependency to ensure compatible driver version.
Add explicit MongoDB core driver dependency to ensure compatible driver version.
Add explicit MongoDB BSON dependency to ensure compatible driver version.
Add Apache Commons Pool2 for connection pooling support.
Add Spring Cloud Sleuth for distributed tracing.
Add Jsoup library for HTML parsing capabilities.
Add PH-Schematron library for XML validation against Schematron rules.
Add Microsoft Authentication Library for Java for Azure AD authentication.
Add Azure Client Authentication library for Azure service authentication.
Add Janino library for dynamic Java compilation, likely for Logback conditional evaluation.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to measure code coverage during tests.
Add OWASP Dependency-Check plugin to scan for vulnerable dependencies.
Add Maven Antrun plugin to execute Ant tasks for copying resources during build.
Exclude SnakeYAML from Spring Boot Web and SpringDoc to manage YAML parsing version explicitly or avoid conflicts.

.gitignore.general_idea: The .gitignore file was completely rewritten to remove IDE-specific sections (STS, IntelliJ, NetBeans, VS Code) and consolidate into a minimal set of common ignore patterns.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced 33 lines of categorized ignore rules with 15 lines of generic patterns like /target/, .idea, .DS_Store.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the minimal project title with a comprehensive README including project description, related repository links, and license badge.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'gtw-validator' with detailed markdown content describing the 'Fascicolo Sanitario 2.0' validator service.
